notes: Over-the-air playbook scripts (roadmap I9). Only additive: extends the hardcoded on-device playbooks. Travel section motivated by State-Dept-style travel advisories bundling tourist scams. No physical-safety claims.

hits.label: fake airline refund via off-official channel
vacation club / timeshare exit advance fee

travel.gemini_snippet: [TRAVEL_OTA] Recent traveler-targeted scripts: airline 'cancelled flight' rebooking-fee texts, fake airline refunds pushed to gift cards, timeshare-exit upfront fees, and travel-insurance claim 'processing fees'. Treat upfront fees, gift-card/wire refunds, and off-official-channel airline/booking support as high risk; tell the user to verify via the airline app or the number on their ticket.
